commands.review_summary:
The PR refines Traditional Chinese wording in `Sources/CodexBar/Resources/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings`, including provider terminology, keychain copy, quota warnings, login, debug, and usage-related text.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a localization wording PR, not a reproducible runtime bug. The relevant check is resource consistency plus a real zh-Hant UI/resource-load proof before merge.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor proof plus human wording review, not a mechanical code repair that ClawSweeper should attempt.

target.title: Improve Traditional Chinese localization wording
target.body:
## Summary
- Refine Traditional Chinese localization wording for more natural Taiwan usage.
- Replace provider terminology from 供應商 to 提供者 across zh-Hant strings.
- Restore missing nuance in keychain, quota warning, login, debug, and usage-related copy.

## Validation
- plutil -lint Sources/CodexBar/Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings Sources/CodexBar/Resources/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings
- placeholder parity check between en and zh-Hant strings
- git diff --check -- Sources/CodexBar/Resources/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings
- high-risk Mainland Chinese wording scan
target.author: jack24254029
